user_system_path: /dashboard visual acceptance seam must pass the same dashboard/UI CI lane locally and in GitHub.
forbidden_files_raw: `components/nav/NavPublic.tsx`, `tests/e2e/public-routes.spec.ts`, controller/autopilot files, `lib/**`, `supabase/migrations/**`, `app/api/stripe/**`, paid generation routes, outbound email paths, schema migrations, destructive DB actions
required_local_proof: npm run build; npm run lint; npx vitest run tests/config/__tests__/large-file-splits.test.ts --reporter=verbose; npx playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-navigation.spec.ts tests/e2e/authenticated-routes.spec.ts --reporter=list; npm run health
required_product_proof: The dashboard/UI CI lane must pass while preserving the full-screen dashboard app shell, empty/no-action state, notification affordances, neutral non-owner copy, write_document preview/support behavior, post-skip empty state, and source-trail/history surfaces.
acceptance_condition: CI passes for the dashboard visual seam while preserving the full-screen dashboard app shell and authenticated dashboard behavior.
stop_condition: Stop if build, lint, large-file-splits, dashboard-navigation, authenticated-routes, push, or GitHub CI fails; do not broaden into public nav, controller/meta, backend/API, paid generation, Stripe, schema, or destructive DB work.
source_truth_finding: Run only customer-visible product seams now. Priority: dashboard visual acceptance.
required_closure_update: Update ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and append SESSION_HISTORY.md with the dashboard visual CI repair receipt and GitHub CI result.
anti_regression_checks: app/dashboard/page.tsx stays at or below 1000 counted lines
desktop dashboard shell fills the viewport and no longer exposes dashboard-figma-card-frame
mobile dashboard has no fake phone/status-bar frame and no horizontal overflow
mobile and desktop notification affordances remain visible where covered
neutral non-owner account copy does not say Workspace Owner or Brandon Kapp
empty/no-action and post-skip states expose dashboard-empty-state without paid scan actions
write_document preview and support text remain visible
dashboard-navigation and authenticated-routes both pass locally before push
next_command: Run dashboard visual CI repair only. Proof ladder: npm run build | npm run lint | npx vitest run tests/config/__tests__/large-file-splits.test.ts --reporter=verbose | npx playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-navigation.spec.ts tests/e2e/authenticated-routes.spec.ts --reporter=list | npm run health. Stop only when pushed and GitHub CI is green.
